claimText: The Systematic Observation Impact Bond is the world's first impact bond focused on weather and climate data, created by the Systematic Observation Financing Facility (SOFF) comprising UNEP, WMO, and UNDP.
evidenceExcerpt: Systematic Observation Impact Bond is the world's first impact bond on weather and climate data, created by SOFF (UNEP, WMO, UNDP).
examUse: Statement-based question on climate finance instruments and their founding organizations.
distractorHooks: Created by the World Bank or IMF instead of SOFF (UNEP, WMO, UNDP)
Claiming it is a green bond for renewable energy infrastructure instead of weather and climate data

claimText: The Global Mutirao Against Extreme Heat is an initiative led by the COP30 Presidency and the UNEP-led Cool Coalition aimed at reducing heat risks for 3 billion people.
evidenceExcerpt: The Global Mutirao Against Extreme Heat, led by the Cool Coalition, aims to reduce heat risks for 3 billion people... Global Mutirao Against Extreme Heat is led by the COP30 Presidency and UNEP-led Cool Coalition, joined by 185 cities.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching climate initiatives with their lead organizations or primary objectives.
distractorHooks: Led by the World Health Organization (WHO) instead of the UNEP-led Cool Coalition
Aims to reduce heat risks for 1 billion people instead of 3 billion

claimText: The Food Waste Breakthrough, led by UNEP, targets halving global food waste and achieving a 7% reduction in methane emissions by 2030.
evidenceExcerpt: Food Waste Breakthrough is led by UNEP and targets halving global food waste and a 7% reduction in methane emissions by 2030.
examUse: Statement-based question on specific targets of the Food Waste Breakthrough initiative.
distractorHooks: Led by the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) instead of UNEP
Targets a 50% reduction in methane emissions instead of 7%

claimText: The Climate and Health Funders Coalition (CHFC) committed an initial $300 million to focus on extreme heat, air pollution, and infectious diseases.
evidenceExcerpt: Climate and Health Funders Coalition (CHFC) committed an initial $300 million focusing on extreme heat, air pollution, and infectious diseases.
examUse: Statement-based question on the focus areas and funding commitments of the CHFC.
distractorHooks: Focusing on renewable energy transition instead of health impacts like extreme heat and infectious diseases
